svg.title: A 300 millimetre wafer lowers unit cost for mature analog chips
svg.desc: Equal-sized analog dies are shown on 200 and 300 millimetre wafers. The larger wafer provides about 2.3 times the area and Texas Instruments estimates roughly forty percent lower unpackaged chip cost.
svg.text: A larger wafer lowers the cost of old designs
The process can stay in production for decades.
MORE DIES · LOWER UNIT COST · LONG PRODUCT LIFE
